item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-07)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 41363 Trending skills: 15625 Hot skills: 2764 Top All Time: find-skills (439405) Top Trending: sleek-design-mobile-apps (13991) Top Hot: agent-tools (1119)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#1): agent-tools
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #1 Installs: 1119 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): baoyu-post-to-wechat
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 55 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Posts content to WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) via Chrome CDP automation. Supports article posting (文章) with full markdown formatting and image-text posting (图文) with multiple images. Use when user mentions "发布公众号", "post to wechat", "微信公众号", or "图文/文章".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): baoyu-xhs-images
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 50 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Generates Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) infographic series with 9 visual styles and 6 layouts. Breaks content into 1-10 cartoon-style images optimized for XHS engagement. Use when user mentions "小红书图片", "XHS images", "RedNote infographics", "小红书种草", or wants social media infographics for Chinese platforms.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): baoyu-post-to-weibo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 43 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Posts content to Weibo (微博). Supports regular posts with text, images, and videos, and headline articles (头条文章) with Markdown input via Chrome CDP. Use when user asks to "post to Weibo", "发微博", "发布微博", "publish to Weibo", "share on Weibo", "写微博", or "微博头条文章".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): baoyu-image-gen
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 57 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: AI image generation with OpenAI and Google APIs. Supports text-to-image, reference images, aspect ratios, and parallel generation (recommended 4 concurrent subagents). Use when user asks to generate, create, or draw images.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): baoyu-cover-image
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 50 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Generates article cover images with 5 dimensions (type, palette, rendering, text, mood) combining 9 color palettes and 6 rendering styles. Supports cinematic (2.35:1), widescreen (16:9), and square (1:1) aspects. Use when user asks to "generate cover image", "create article cover", "make cover", or mentions "封面图".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): baoyu-article-illustrator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 48 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Analyzes article structure, identifies positions requiring visual aids, generates illustrations with Type × Style two-dimension approach. Use when user asks to "illustrate article", "add images", "generate images for article", or "为文章配图".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): baoyu-slide-deck
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 47 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Generates professional slide deck images from content. Creates outlines with style instructions, then generates individual slide images. Use when user asks to "create slides", "make a presentation", "generate deck", "slide deck", or "PPT".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): baoyu-comic
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 44 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Knowledge comic creator supporting multiple art styles and tones. Creates original educational comics with detailed panel layouts and sequential image generation. Use when user asks to create "知识漫画", "教育漫画", "biography comic", "tutorial comic", or "Logicomix-style comic".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): baoyu-post-to-x
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 44 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Posts content and articles to X (Twitter). Supports regular posts with images/videos and X Articles (long-form Markdown). Uses real Chrome with CDP to bypass anti-automation. Use when user asks to "post to X", "tweet", "publish to Twitter", or "share on X".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): deploy-to-vercel
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 36 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel. Use when the user requests deployment actions like "deploy my app", "deploy and give me the link", "push this live", or "create a preview deployment".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): python-sdk
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 159 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Python SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, and integrate with 150+ models. Package: inferencesh (pip install inferencesh). Supports sync/async, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, and human approval. Use for: Python integration, AI apps, agent development, RAG pipelines, automation. Triggers: python sdk, inferencesh, pip install, python api, python client, async inference, python agent, tool builder python, programmatic ai, python integration, sdk python

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): baoyu-infographic
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 44 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Generates professional infographics with 20 layout types and 17 visual styles. Analyzes content, recommends layout×style combinations, and generates publication-ready infographics. Use when user asks to create "infographic", "信息图", "visual summary", or "可视化".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): baoyu-url-to-markdown
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 43 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Fetch any URL and convert to markdown using Chrome CDP. Supports two modes - auto-capture on page load, or wait for user signal (for pages requiring login). Use when user wants to save a webpage as markdown.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): baoyu-danger-gemini-web
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 41 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Generates images and text via reverse-engineered Gemini Web API. Supports text generation, image generation from prompts, reference images for vision input, and multi-turn conversations. Use when other skills need image generation backend, or when user requests "generate image with Gemini", "Gemini text generation", or needs vision-capable AI generation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): baoyu-markdown-to-html
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 41 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Converts Markdown to styled HTML with WeChat-compatible themes. Supports code highlighting, math, PlantUML, footnotes, alerts, and infographics. Use when user asks for "markdown to html", "convert md to html", "md转html", or needs styled HTML output from markdown.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): baoyu-format-markdown
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 40 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Formats plain text or markdown files with frontmatter, titles, summaries, headings, bold, lists, and code blocks. Use when user asks to "format markdown", "beautify article", "add formatting", or improve article layout. Outputs to {filename}-formatted.md.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): baoyu-compress-image
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 40 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Compresses images to WebP (default) or PNG with automatic tool selection. Use when user asks to "compress image", "optimize image", "convert to webp", or reduce image file size.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): baoyu-danger-x-to-markdown
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 39 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Converts X (Twitter) tweets and articles to markdown with YAML front matter. Uses reverse-engineered API requiring user consent. Use when user mentions "X to markdown", "tweet to markdown", "save tweet", or provides x.com/twitter.com URLs for conversion.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): frontend-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 51 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): baoyu-translate
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 48 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Translates articles and documents between languages with three modes - quick (direct), normal (analyze then translate), and refined (analyze, translate, review, polish). Supports custom glossaries and terminology consistency via EXTEND.md. Use when user asks to "translate", "翻译", "精翻", "translate article", "translate to Chinese/English", "改成中文", "改成英文", "convert to Chinese", "localize", "本地化", or needs any document translation. Also triggers for "refined translation", "精细翻译", "proofread translation", "快速翻译", "快翻", "这篇文章翻译一下", or when a URL or file is provided with translation intent.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): adapt
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 49 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Adapt designs to work across different screen sizes, devices, contexts, or platforms. Ensures consistent experience across varied environments.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#3): videoagent-video-studio
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #3 Installs: 150 Source: pexoai/pexo-skills Description: Generate short AI videos from text or images — text-to-video, image-to-video, and reference-based generation — with zero API key setup. Use when the user wants to create a video clip, animate an image, or generate video from a description.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): onboard
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 48 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Design or improve onboarding flows, empty states, and first-time user experiences. Helps users get started successfully and understand value quickly.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): animate
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 47 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Review a feature and enhance it with purposeful animations, micro-interactions, and motion effects that improve usability and delight.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): release-skills
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 37 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Universal release workflow. Auto-detects version files and changelogs. Supports Node.js, Python, Rust, Claude Plugin, and generic projects. Use when user says "release", "发布", "new version", "bump version", "push", "推送".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): audit
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 48 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Perform comprehensive audit of interface quality across accessibility, performance, theming, and responsive design. Generates detailed report of issues with severity ratings and recommendations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): polish
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 48 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Final quality pass before shipping. Fixes alignment, spacing, consistency, and detail issues that separate good from great.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): optimize
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 48 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve interface performance across loading speed, rendering, animations, images, and bundle size. Makes experiences faster and smoother.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): normalize
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 47 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Normalize design to match your design system and ensure consistency

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): harden
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 47 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve interface resilience through better error handling, i18n support, text overflow handling, and edge case management. Makes interfaces robust and production-ready.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): delight
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 47 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Add moments of joy, personality, and unexpected touches that make interfaces memorable and enjoyable to use. Elevates functional to delightful.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): distill
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 47 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Strip designs to their essence by removing unnecessary complexity. Great design is simple, powerful, and clean.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): javascript-sdk
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 144 Source: toolshell/skills Description: JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, integrate 150+ models. Package: @inferencesh/sdk (npm install). Full TypeScript support, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, human approval. Use for: JavaScript integration, TypeScript, Node.js, React, Next.js, frontend apps. Triggers: javascript sdk, typescript sdk, npm install, node.js api, js client, react ai, next.js ai, frontend sdk, @inferencesh/sdk, typescript agent, browser sdk, js integration

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): teach-impeccable
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 47 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: One-time setup that gathers design context for your project and saves it to your AI config file. Run once to establish persistent design guidelines.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): extract
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 46 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Extract and consolidate reusable components, design tokens, and patterns into your design system. Identifies opportunities for systematic reuse and enriches your component library.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): clarify
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 47 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve unclear UX copy, error messages, microcopy, labels, and instructions. Makes interfaces easier to understand and use.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): bolder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 46 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Amplify safe or boring designs to make them more visually interesting and stimulating. Increases impact while maintaining usability.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): quieter
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 46 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Tone down overly bold or visually aggressive designs. Reduces intensity while maintaining design quality and impact.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): colorize
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 46 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Add strategic color to features that are too monochromatic or lack visual interest. Makes interfaces more engaging and expressive.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): critique
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 46 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Evaluate design effectiveness from a UX perspective. Assesses visual hierarchy, information architecture, emotional resonance, and overall design quality with actionable feedback.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): search
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 37 Source: tavily-ai/skills Description: Search the web using Tavily's LLM-optimized search API. Returns relevant results with content snippets, scores, and metadata. Use when you need to find web content on any topic without writing code.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): defuddle
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 17 Source: joeseesun/defuddle-skill Description: Extract clean article content from web pages or local HTML files. Removes clutter (ads, sidebars, nav) and returns readable content with metadata.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): xiaohongshu
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 27 Source: zhjiang22/openclaw-xhs Description: 小红书内容工具。使用场景： - 搜索小红书内容 - 获取首页推荐列表 - 获取帖子详情（包括互动数据和评论） - 发表评论到帖子 - 获取用户个人主页 - "跟踪一下小红书上的XX热点" - "分析小红书上关于XX的讨论" - "小红书XX话题报告" - "生成XX的小红书舆情报告"

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): widgets-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 131 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Declarative UI widgets from JSON for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Render rich interactive UIs from structured agent responses. Capabilities: forms, buttons, cards, layouts, inputs, selects, checkboxes. Use for: agent-generated UIs, dynamic forms, data display, interactive cards. Triggers: widgets, declarative ui, json ui, widget renderer, agent widgets, dynamic ui, form widgets, card widgets, shadcn widgets, structured output ui

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#6): chat-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #6 Installs: 126 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Chat UI building blocks for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Components: container, messages, input, typing indicators, avatars. Capabilities: chat interfaces, message lists, input handling, streaming. Use for: building custom chat UIs, messaging interfaces, AI assistants. Triggers: chat ui, chat component, message list, chat input, shadcn chat, react chat, chat interface, messaging ui, conversation ui, chat building blocks

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#8): agent-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #8 Installs: 117 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Batteries-included agent component for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. One component with runtime, tools, streaming, approvals, and widgets built in. Capabilities: drop-in agent, human-in-the-loop, client-side tools, form filling. Use for: building AI chat interfaces, agentic UIs, SaaS copilots, assistants. Triggers: agent component, agent ui, chat agent, shadcn agent, react agent, agentic ui, ai assistant ui, copilot ui, inference ui, human in the loop

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#9): tools-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 116 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Tool lifecycle UI components for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Display tool calls: pending, progress, approval required, results. Capabilities: tool status, progress indicators, approval flows, results display. Use for: showing agent tool calls, human-in-the-loop approvals, tool output. Triggers: tool ui, tool calls, tool status, tool approval, tool results, agent tools, mcp tools ui, function calling ui, tool lifecycle, tool pending

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#22): agent-tools
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 3155 Source: toolshell/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#49): videoagent-image-studio
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 1456 Source: pexoai/pexo-skills Description: Tired of juggling 8 API keys? This skill gives you one-command access to Midjourney, Flux, Ideogram, and more, with zero setup. Use when you want to generate any image without worrying about API keys.
